title: ayenia rubriflora
intro: Ayenia rubriflora, also known as the red-flowered ayenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ayenia rubriflora include relieving coughs and congestion, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant. Ayenia rubriflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
